name: Smokey Jollof Rice
description: Authentic firewood smokey jollof served with fried plantain and your choice of protein.

name: Special Egusi Soup
description: Rich melon seed soup with assorted meat, stockfish, and spinach. Best with Pounded Yam.

name: Gourmet Beef Suya
description: Thinly sliced grilled beef spiced with authentic Yaji. Served with onions and tomatoes.

name: Pounded Yam
description: Freshly pounded local yam, smooth and stretchy. Perfect for any of our soups.

name: Zobo Drink
description: Chilled hibiscus flower drink infused with ginger, cloves, and pineapple.
